meta.title: End-of-day triage — Tuesday, June 30, 2026
meta.lede: Full task review. Items are now data-driven — updating them doesn't touch the rendering code. Three grouping modes: Program, Status (P/U/W), Discipline.

voice.h4: Architecture change: items are now data-driven
voice.p: All 35 open items are defined in data.json. Future updates only touch the data — not the rendering code. Adding an item = one new object in the array. Checking it off = done toggle. Nothing breaks.

Program (Concourse B → packages, Centralized / PBS, etc.), Status (groups all Blocking P items together, then Unverified U, Watch W, and Open), and Discipline (groups by Architectural, Structural, Mechanical, Electrical, Signage, etc.). Metadata — status badge, discipline pills, court, action type — shows on every item in every view.

Horizon chips (Today / Before Jul 3 / This Week) and action chips (Model / Review / Coordinate / Chase / Admin) work in all three views. Today's Focus is computed — it pulls items tagged horizon=today in your court, so it's always accurate.

Done: Revit type-parameter fix, VW Mason hidden in Revizto, Jun 30 YYC Security meeting (Centralized NPSC exit/core doors). New: Haptic TP5 review, retail/banner detail, Kirk RFI check-in, Entro 100% DD wayfinding review. Sub-tasks and timeline history on 11 key items.
